executives.name: Aparna Bawa
executives.background: Chief Operating Officer of Zoom Video Communications, Inc. She joined our board in May 2021.

executives.name: Bill McDermott
executives.background: Bill McDermott has served as our President and Chief Executive Officer and as a member of our Board since November 2019. From 2010 to 2019, Mr. McDermott served as CEO of SAP SE. He joined SAP in 2002 and held various leadership positions before becoming CEO.

executives.name: Dan Scheinman
executives.background: Angel investor. Former Senior Vice President, Corporate Development at Cisco Systems.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Board of Directors
